Uses of Interface
org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.query.QueryEnhancerFactory

Packages that use QueryEnhancerFactory
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.query
Query implementation to execute queries against JPA.

  • Uses of QueryEnhancerFactory in org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.query

    Field
    Description

    Methods in org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.query that return QueryEnhancerFactory
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static QueryEnhancerFactory
    QueryEnhancerFactories.eql()
    Returns a QueryEnhancerFactory using EQL (EclipseLink Query Language) parser.
    static QueryEnhancerFactory
    QueryEnhancerFactories.fallback()
    Returns the default fallback QueryEnhancerFactory using regex-based detection.
    static QueryEnhancerFactory
    QueryEnhancerFactory.forQuery(DeclaredQuery query)
    Creates a new QueryEnhancerFactory for the given DeclaredQuery.
    static QueryEnhancerFactory
    QueryEnhancerFactories.hql()
    Returns a QueryEnhancerFactory using HQL (Hibernate Query Language) parser.
    static QueryEnhancerFactory
    QueryEnhancerFactories.jpql()
    Returns a QueryEnhancerFactory using JPQL (Jakarta Persistence Query Language) parser as per the JPA spec.
    static QueryEnhancerFactory
    QueryEnhancerSelector.DefaultQueryEnhancerSelector.jpql()
    Returns the default JPQL QueryEnhancerFactory based on class path presence of Hibernate and EclipseLink.
    static QueryEnhancerFactory
    QueryEnhancerFactories.jsqlparser()
    Returns a QueryEnhancerFactory that uses JSqlParser if it is available from the class path.
    QueryEnhancerFactory
    QueryEnhancerSelector.DefaultQueryEnhancerSelector.select(DeclaredQuery query)
     
    QueryEnhancerFactory
    QueryEnhancerSelector.select(DeclaredQuery query)
    Select a QueryEnhancer for a query.
